data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for optional biz-triggered verification request events.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of optional biz-triggered verification request events, but the provided evidence does not include any details or records confirming their existence. The linked use case mentions the need for these events, yet there is no evidence presented that supports their implementation or compliance with the requirement. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary evidence is lacking.
gaps: No evidence of optional biz-triggered verification request events.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
